title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-host LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Phi-3, Gemma, etc.) behind a simple REST/CLI API with GPU/Metal acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party async/sync Python client for the Ollama API; install via pip install ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; npm i ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package langchain-ollama; drop-in LLM & embeddings for chains, agents, RAG.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web frontend for any Ollama model; Docker one-liner.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Terminal UI wrapper (fzf + gum) for interactive model/chat management.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Neovim plugin that turns Ollama models into inline code copilots.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension to chat with local Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama; use local models as generators & embedders.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: RAG, function-calling, fine-tune, Docker Compose stacks, GPU tuning.

title: ollama-nest
summary: NestJS module wrapping the Ollama JS client for dependency injection.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for Ollama API; gem install ollama.

title: ollama-go
summary: Community Go client with context cancellation and streaming support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples with CUDA/ROCm variants.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG starter using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that chats with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for private Ollama chats and code reviews.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: SwiftUI native macOS menu-bar app for quick Ollama prompts.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app exposing Ollama as async chat & embed endpoints.
